gates.name: no_execution_boundary
gates.reason: Harness is research-only and emits no account/order fields.

method.cost_basis: all_in_break_even_probability or all_in_cost supplied in the label packet
method.p_value: one-sided binomial survival on positive OOS realized PnL rows
method.split: chronological holdout by decision_ts with time-safety checks

next_action.name: collect_hypothesis_labeled_observation_packets
next_action.stop_condition: Stop before testing or promoting hypotheses from unlabeled, time-unsafe, or non-cost-aware rows.
next_action.why: The harness exists, but no settled OOS observations are keyed to HypothesisCandidate IDs yet.
